headline: Is Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) Pricing In Too Much Future Growth After Its Strong Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Monolithic Power Systems at around US$1,099 per share still offers value or is priced for perfection, you are not alone. The stock has had a mixed short term, with a 10.8% decline over the last 7 days and a 6.3% decline over the last 30 days. Yet it still shows returns of 17.4% year to date, 81.0% over 1 year, 122.8% over 3 years and 252.4% over 5 years. Recent coverage around Monolithic Power Systems has focused on its position within the broader semiconductor...
